## Description

Summarize the changes in this PR. Include the motivation and context. If this resolves an issue, link it below.

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] New feature / enhancement (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Standards update (adds or amends a published standard)
- [ ] Tooling / CI/CD

---

## Checklist

Please verify the following before requesting review:

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../docs/contributing.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the project's writing and coding standards
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation where necessary
- [ ] All existing CI checks pass on my branch
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally (for code changes)
- [ ] I have not introduced any secrets, credentials, or sensitive data
- [ ] Related issues are linked above

---

## Testing

Describe how the changes were tested. For documentation-only PRs, this section may be brief.

- **Test environment**: 
- **Steps taken**: 
- **Results**:

## Screenshots / Diffs (optional)

If this PR changes UI or rendered output (e.g., documentation formatting), add before/after screenshots.

## Reviewer Notes

Anything specific you'd like reviewers to focus on, open questions, or areas of uncertainty.
